mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.applied_at, a.viewed_at, a.updated_at, a.status, a.interview_time, j.title AS job_title, c.name AS company_name, u.nickname AS applicant_name, r.resume_name -- 注意：开发版 resumes 表字段名为 resume_name FROM applications a LEFT JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.id LEFT JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.id LEFT JOIN resumes r ON a.resume_id = r.id LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id -- 关键：这里是 user_id，不是 applicant_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.applied_at DESC

SELECT -- ================== 职位信息 ================== j.title, j.category, j.salary_min AS salaryMin, j.salary_max AS salaryMax, j.experience, j.education, j.tags, j.headcount, j.duty_content AS dutyContent, j.require_content AS requireContent, j.benefits, j.status As jobStatus, j.view_count AS viewCount, j.apply_count AS applyCount, j.hr_user_id As hrId,
-- ================== 公司信息 ================== c.name, c.description, c.industry, c.size, c.city, c.address, c.logo_url AS logoUrl, -- ================== ✅ 你要的 3 个新字段 ================== a.applied_at AS appliedAt, a.interview_time AS interviewTime, a.status As applicationStatus, a.operator_id As operatorId, u.realname AS realName
FROM applications a INNER JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.id INNER JOIN companies c ON j.company_id = c.id LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id
WHERE a.id = #{applicationId}

with a as ( select * from applications where company_id = #{query.companyId} ) select a.id ,j.id as jobId ,a.resume_id as resumeId ,a.user_id as userId ,a.status ,a.interview_time as interviewTime ,a.hr_remark as hrRemark ,a.applied_at as appliedAt ,a.viewed_at as viewedAt ,j.title as jobTitle ,u.realname as applicantName from a inner join users as u on a.user_id = u.id inner join jobs as j on a.job_id = j.id where 1=1
and u.realname like concat('%', #{query.applicantName}, '%')
and j.title like concat('%', #{query.jobTitle}, '%')
and a.status = #{query.status}

SELECT a.id, a.status, u.realname AS applicantName, j.title AS jobTitle, c.name AS companyName, DATE_FORMAT(a.applied_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS appliedAt, DATE_FORMAT(a.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM applications a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON a.job_id = j.id LEFT JOIN companies c ON a.company_id = c.id WHERE 1=1
AND u.realname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{applicantName}, '%')
AND j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobTitle}, '%')
AND a.status = #{status}
ORDER BY a.applied_at DESC
